title: schoutenia glomerata
intro: Schoutenia glomerata, also known as the cluster schoutenia, is a plant species in the family Melastomataceae. It is a shrub native to Malaysia and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to the presence of bioactive compounds like flavonoids and terpenoids. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a decoction or infusion, and it is also used in the form of a paste or ointment to treat various ailments.
